Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCF00 "URBANUPSTART-CF00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Urban Upstart.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $CF00 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers, so the execution can start at the point the loader has finished and start the game. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Note: to dump, simply wait until the game has loaded and the title screen is shown.
